_doc: Samsung Trade-In max published values per model id. Refreshed weekly by scripts/refresh-samsung-comps.py via .github/workflows/refresh-comps.yml. Frontend reads this at runtime when device is in the Samsung family (android / samsung_tab / samsung_pc / samsungwatch). CONVENTION: only include a model when Samsung's actual trade-in calculator lists it. Current-generation flagships (within ~6 months of launch) are usually NOT accepted by Samsung — leave them out and the frontend renders a 'Samsung won't trade this — we will' badge instead. Adding an entry implies the value was actually scraped from samsung.com/us/shop/mobile/trade-in.
